subject: [multicloud] Correct multicloud-k8s MSB URL
commit_message:
[multicloud] Correct multicloud-k8s MSB URL

Corrected URL in MSB makes multicloud-k8s backward incompatible.
Introduced flag "legacyCompatibility" that allows to spawn
multicloud-k8s in backward compatibility mode that is turned off by
default. Besides, it also sets MSB url to variant used in ElAlto.
You can start multicloud-k8s in legacy compatible mode for
example by passing runtime flag to helm deploy `--set
multicloud.multicloud-k8s.legacyCompatibility=true`

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-1053
Signed-off-by: Konrad Bańka <k.banka@samsung.com>
Change-Id: Ifcf6092448ec1857f7d8e80172b1f6880f02603f
